description: Characters who perform, create art, or entertain others.
characters: A captivating voice who spins tales that make people forget the time.
A gifted player whose melodies can lift spirits or bring tears.
A graceful figure who speaks through movement and rhythm.
A voice that can fill a hall or hush a crowd to silence.
A color-stained artist who captures the world on canvas.
A patient shaper who finds forms hidden inside stone or clay.
A word-weaver who distills feelings into verses that linger.
A creative soul who sees beauty others overlook.
